case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ANTHONY ALFREDO PALACIOS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALACIOS, ANTHONY ALFREDO $579.32 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $664.32 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $579.32 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, ANTHONY ALFREDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED AUG-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, ANTHONY ALFREDO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-28-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, ANTHONY ALFREDO
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $150.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, ANTHONY ALFREDO

DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
